query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multi-turn reflective masking elicits reasoning in mask diffusion mode" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (reasoning capabilities in LLMs) and measures the same dependent variable (reasoning performance via chain-of-thought) as the user's question, even though it employs a different methodological approach (Alignment Fine-Tuning) compared to the user's focus on "Reflective Masking" in diffusion models. It provides essential prior work on the "reasoning" construct in LLMs that a literature review would need to cite t
